since_last: 80% of 89 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +1.79%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 80% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.53% · BTC +0.92% · Gold -0.43% · Nasdaq100 +0.72%. 80% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +1.79%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +1.79%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -1.97%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: HON is the standout at -48.68%
cards.body: Leaders: BIDU +4.56%, AVAV +4.22%, SPCX +3.35%, ORCL +3.30%, BBAI +3.16%. Laggards: HON -48.68%, DELL -2.30%, INTC -1.94%, MU -1.90%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +3.35% at $158.37
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +3.35% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
